nasb.text: Now one of the servants of Saul was there that day, detained before the Lord; and his name was Doeg the Edomite, the chief of Saul’s shepherds.

esv.text: Now a certain man of the servants of Saul was there that day, detained before the Lord. His name was Doeg the Edomite, the chief of Saul’s herdsmen.

cnv.text: 那天有一個掃羅的臣僕在那裡，留在耶和華面前。他名叫多益，是以東人，是掃羅牧羊人中的領袖。

ccb.text: 那天，扫罗的司牧长以东人多益碰巧在耶和华的会幕。
